# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.FalloffZoneEnteredEventHandler delegate

Emitted when a listener enters the falloff zone (between inner and outer).

```csharp
public delegate void FalloffZoneEnteredEventHandler(Node3D listener);
```

| parameter | description |

| listener | The object that is receiving sound. |
